scores.correctness_notes: Covers all required fields, all three protocol types with correct URL formats, and multiple targets. Matches gold standard well.
scores.hallucination_notes: The charm integration Python code uses fabricated event/API patterns (event.relation.data[event.app].get('url'), container.add_layer with combine=True parameter, container.replan()) that may not exactly match real charm APIs. The 'loki-push-api' integration pattern is real but the specific code shown is invented. Also mentions $JUJU_UNIT_NAME as an example env var for label interpolation — this is reasonable but not in the gold standard.
